(string) filemtime($random_js_path) : GU_SCENE_ARCHIVE_VERSION, true ); } public function filter_front_page_builder_content($data, $post_id) { if (is_admin()) { return $data; } $front_page_id = (int) get_option('page_on_front'); if ($front_page_id <= 0 || (int) $post_id !== $front_page_id) { return $data; } $haystack = (string) get_post_field('post_content', $front_page_id) . "\n" . (string) get_post_meta($front_page_id, '_elementor_data', true); if (false !== strpos($haystack, '[gu_scene_archive_homepage')) { return $data; } return array($this->build_front_page_container()); } public function render_homepage_shortcode($atts = array()) { $atts = shortcode_atts( array( 'primary_cta_label' => 'Explore Archive', 'primary_cta_url' => home_url('/archive/'), 'secondary_cta_label' => 'Watch Performances', 'secondary_cta_url' => home_url('/performances/'), ), $atts, 'gu_scene_archive_homepage' ); $hero_subline = 'A living archive of local sound, performance, and scene memory.'; $hero_summary = 'The Gallatin Underground began as a platform for local artists, performances, and community media. What remains now is more focused: a living archive of the scene, shaped by memory, documentation, and the work that still deserves to be seen.'; $current_state = 'The Gallatin Underground is not as active as it once was, and that is part of the truth of the project. What began as a louder, faster platform has become something more deliberate: a place to preserve performances, artists, venues, and the history surrounding them. The pace changed. The record stayed.'; $featured_memory = $this->render_featured_memory_section(); $performances = $this->render_homepage_cards_section( 'scene_video', array( 'limit' => 3, 'featured_only' => 1, 'heading' => 'Performances', 'summary' => 'Performances from the archive, documented, remembered, and kept in reach.', 'kicker' => 'Performances', 'cta_label' => 'View the Performance Archive', 'cta_url' => home_url('/performances/'), 'section_id' => 'performances', 'show_description' => 1, 'show_type' => 1, 'show_meta' => 1, 'excerpt_words' => 20, 'columns' => 3, 'card_min_width' => 240, 'section_class' => 'gu-homepage-performances', ) ); $archive = $this->render_homepage_cards_section( 'archive_item', array( 'limit' => 3, 'featured_only' => 1, 'heading' => 'Scene Archive', 'summary' => 'Beyond the performances: posters, memory, places, and pieces of the scene that would otherwise disappear.', 'kicker' => 'Archive Depth', 'cta_label' => 'Explore the Archive', 'cta_url' => home_url('/archive/'), 'section_id' => 'scene-archive', 'show_description' => 1, 'show_type' => 1, 'show_meta' => 1, 'excerpt_words' => 22, 'columns' => 3, 'card_min_width' => 240, 'section_class' => 'gu-homepage-archive', ) ); $history = $this->render_history_shortcode( array( 'limit' => 3, 'featured_only' => 1, 'heading' => 'History / Legacy', 'summary' => 'Where the project came from, how its role changed, and why the archive still matters now.', 'kicker' => 'History', 'cta_label' => 'Explore the History', 'cta_url' => home_url('/history/'), 'section_id' => 'history-legacy', 'intro' => 'The Gallatin Underground began as a more active platform for local music, live streams, and community media. Over time, its role changed. What remains now is not a replica of that earlier pace, but a clearer purpose: to preserve what was built, what was captured, and what still deserves a place in the record.', ) ); $community = $this->render_community_section(); $closing_note = $this->render_closing_note_section(); $current_state_section = $this->render_narrative_section( array( 'heading' => 'Present Condition', 'summary' => 'The pace changed. The record stayed.', 'kicker' => 'Present Condition', 'cta_label' => '', 'cta_url' => '', 'section_id' => 'present-condition', ), wpautop(esc_html($current_state)), array('gu-homepage-present-condition') ); ob_start(); ?>

Gallatin Scene Record

The Gallatin Underground

The older recordings, venue traces, flyers, and artist records matter because they explain how this scene moved, where it gathered, and what still deserves to be remembered.', 'archive_type' => '', ), $atts, 'gu_scene_archive_history' ); $archive_type = sanitize_title((string) $atts['archive_type']); if ('' === $archive_type) { $archive_type = $this->detect_history_archive_type_slug(); } $limit = max(1, absint($atts['limit'])); $featured_only = $this->to_bool($atts['featured_only']); $query_variants = array(); if ('' !== $archive_type) { $query_variants[] = array( 'atts' => array('archive_type' => $archive_type), 'featured_only' => $featured_only, ); $query_variants[] = array( 'atts' => array('archive_type' => $archive_type), 'featured_only' => false, ); } $query_variants[] = array( 'atts' => array(), 'featured_only' => $featured_only, ); $query_variants[] = array( 'atts' => array(), 'featured_only' => false, ); $posts = array(); foreach ($query_variants as $variant) { $posts = get_posts($this->build_query_args('archive_item', $limit, $variant['featured_only'], $variant['atts'], false)); if (! empty($posts)) { break; } } $body = '
' . wpautop(esc_html((string) $atts['intro'])) . '
'; if (! empty($posts)) { $body .= $this->render_cards_grid( $posts, 'archive_item', array( 'show_excerpt' => true, 'show_meta' => true, 'show_type' => true, 'show_thumbnail' => true, 'excerpt_words' => 24, ) ); } return $this->render_custom_section($atts, $body, array('gu-homepage-history')); } public function render_events_shortcode($atts) { $atts = shortcode_atts( array( 'limit' => 3, 'heading' => 'Events', 'summary' => 'Upcoming dates when they exist, and recent scene memory when they do not.', 'kicker' => 'Events', 'cta_label' => 'View Calendar', 'cta_url' => home_url('/calendar/'), 'fallback_limit' => 3, ), $atts, 'gu_scene_archive_events' ); $limit = max(1, absint($atts['limit'])); $upcoming = $this->get_mec_event_posts($limit, true); if (! empty($upcoming)) { return $this->render_custom_section( $atts, $this->render_event_cards_grid($upcoming, false), array('gu-homepage-events') ); } $past = $this->get_mec_event_posts($limit, false); if (! empty($past)) { $atts['summary'] = 'No upcoming events are on deck right now, so this section surfaces recent gatherings instead of leaving the homepage empty.'; return $this->render_custom_section( $atts, $this->render_event_cards_grid($past, true), array('gu-homepage-events', 'gu-homepage-events-past') ); } $fallback_limit = max(1, absint($atts['fallback_limit'])); $fallback = get_posts($this->build_query_args('archive_item', $fallback_limit, true, array(), false)); if (empty($fallback)) { $fallback = get_posts($this->build_query_args('archive_item', $fallback_limit, false, array(), false)); } $body = '

No upcoming events are scheduled right now, so this section falls back to the archive instead of presenting an empty calendar state.

'Start Here' : 'Explore the Archive', 'cta_url' => $cta_url, 'section_id' => 'featured-memory', ), $body, array('gu-homepage-featured-memory') ); } private function get_homepage_featured_memory_post() { $history_archive_type = $this->detect_history_archive_type_slug(); $query_variants = array(); if ('' !== $history_archive_type) { $query_variants[] = array('post_type' => 'archive_item', 'featured_only' => true, 'atts' => array('archive_type' => $history_archive_type)); $query_variants[] = array('post_type' => 'archive_item', 'featured_only' => false, 'atts' => array('archive_type' => $history_archive_type)); } $query_variants[] = array('post_type' => 'archive_item', 'featured_only' => true, 'atts' => array()); $query_variants[] = array('post_type' => 'scene_video', 'featured_only' => true, 'atts' => array()); $query_variants[] = array('post_type' => 'archive_item', 'featured_only' => false, 'atts' => array()); $query_variants[] = array('post_type' => 'scene_video', 'featured_only' => false, 'atts' => array()); foreach ($query_variants as $variant) { $posts = get_posts($this->build_query_args($variant['post_type'], 1, $variant['featured_only'], $variant['atts'], false)); if (! empty($posts)) { return $posts[0]; } } return null; } private function render_community_section() { $copy = 'This record belongs to more than one voice. '; if (! empty($groups)) { $body .= '

It stays rooted in Gallatin Valley artists, venues, and artifacts, with the archive carrying as much weight as whatever is current right now.'; $about_url = home_url('/about-us/'); if ($about_page instanceof WP_Post) { $about_url = get_permalink($about_page); $source_text = (string) $about_page->post_excerpt; if ('' === trim($source_text)) { $source_text = wp_strip_all_tags(strip_shortcodes((string) $about_page->post_content)); } if ('' !== trim($source_text) && ! $this->contains_promotional_about_copy($source_text)) { $about_copy = wp_trim_words($source_text, 52); } } return $this->render_narrative_section( array( 'heading' => 'About', 'summary' => 'A local archive first, with a continued but lighter present-tense presence.', 'kicker' => 'About', 'cta_label' => 'Read About', 'cta_url' => $about_url, 'section_id' => 'about', ), '

$this->contains_transitional_copy($content)) { return wp_trim_words($content, max(8, absint($word_count))); } return $this->build_metadata_fallback_excerpt($post->ID, $post_type); } private function contains_transitional_copy($text) { $haystack = strtolower(trim(wp_strip_all_tags((string) $text))); if ('' === $haystack) { return false; } $markers = array( 'review seed entry', 'seed entry', 'seeded for', 'search relevance', 'archive review', 'review-stage', 'review stage', 'internal testing', 'new scene archive search and performance library', 'artist discovery and local search relevance', 'performance library review', 'welcome to the gu radio', 'like, comment, and subscribe', 'hit that subscribe button', 'your support means everything to us', 'coupon code', 'check them out at', 'tune in tomorrow', 'tune in monday', 'premiere', '#thegallatinunderground', '#knowyourscene', ); foreach ($markers as $marker) { if (false !== strpos($haystack, $marker)) { return true; } } if (substr_count($haystack, '#') >= 3) { return true; } return false; } private function build_metadata_fallback_excerpt($post_id, $post_type) { if ('scene_video' === $post_type) { $artist = $this->get_first_term_name($post_id, 'scene_artist'); $venue = $this->get_first_term_name($post_id, 'scene_venue'); $area = $this->get_first_term_name($post_id, 'scene_area'); $year = $this->get_first_term_name($post_id, 'scene_year'); $parts = array_filter(array($artist, $venue)); if (! empty($parts)) { $sentence = implode(' at ', array_slice($parts, 0, 2)); if ($area) { $sentence .= ' in ' . $area; } if ($year) { $sentence .= ' (' . $year . ')'; } return 'Performance record preserving ' . $sentence . '.'; } return 'Performance record preserved as part of the Gallatin scene archive.'; } $archive_type = $this->get_first_term_name($post_id, 'archive_type'); $history_topic = $this->get_first_term_name($post_id, 'history_topic'); $area = $this->get_first_term_name($post_id, 'scene_area'); $year = $this->get_first_term_name($post_id, 'scene_year'); $subject = $history_topic ? $history_topic : ($archive_type ? strtolower($archive_type) : 'scene memory'); $sentence = 'Archive record preserving ' . $subject; if ($area) { $sentence .= ' from ' . $area; } if ($year) { $sentence .= ' (' . $year . ')'; } return rtrim($sentence, '.') . '.'; } private function get_first_term_name($post_id, $taxonomy) { $terms = wp_get_post_terms($post_id, $taxonomy, array('fields' => 'names')); if (is_wp_error($terms) || empty($terms)) { return ''; } return (string) $terms[0]; } private function contains_promotional_about_copy($text) { $haystack = strtolower(trim(wp_strip_all_tags((string) $text))); $markers = array( 'audio/video production', 'live sound engineering', 'advertising opportunities', 'merch shop', 'provides free live streams', 'services', ); foreach ($markers as $marker) { if (false !== strpos($haystack, $marker)) { return true; } } return false; } private function get_card_type_label($post_type, $post_id = 0) { if ('scene_video' === $post_type) { return 'Performance'; } if ($post_id > 0) { $history_topics = wp_get_post_terms($post_id, 'history_topic', array('fields' => 'ids')); $archive_types = wp_get_post_terms($post_id, 'archive_type', array('fields' => 'slugs')); if ((! is_wp_error($history_topics) && ! empty($history_topics)) || (! is_wp_error($archive_types) && in_array('history', $archive_types, true))) { return 'History Record'; } } return 'Scene Record'; } private function get_primary_record_url($post_id) { return get_permalink($post_id); } private function normalize_cta_url($url) { $url = trim((string) $url); if ('' === $url) { return home_url('/'); } if ('/' === substr($url, 0, 1)) { return home_url($url); } return $url; } private function to_bool($value) { if (is_bool($value)) { return $value; } return in_array((string) $value, array('1', 'true', 'yes', 'on'), true); } }
